docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-14-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-14-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEDEVO.
